# Konstantin Peselev — Senior Product Manager

> Senior Product Manager with 10+ years of B2B SaaS experience. Currently at Totango (acquired Catalyst), leading Growth, Data Governance, and AI product roadmaps. Co-founder background. MBA from NYU Stern.

This is the portfolio site of Konstantin Peselev. The site is a curated set of product management case studies, an about page, and a resume. Static content; updates infrequently.

## Primary content

- [Home](/): Overview, elevator pitch, gallery of selected case studies.
- [Work](/work): Complete archive of case studies.
- [About](/about): Background and product philosophy.
- [Resume](/resume): Career history and education. PDF available at /cv.pdf.

## Case studies

Each case study lives at /work/{slug}. The slug is derived from the project filename. Case studies follow a consistent structure: context, problem, what I did, outcomes, takeaway.
